# Left PEQ filters
# miniDSP-style peaking filters plus normalized biquad coefficients
# Biquad convention: y[n] = b0*x[n] + b1*x[n-1] + b2*x[n-2] - a1*y[n-1] - a2*y[n-2]

Filter 1: ON PK Fc 109.131 Hz Gain +3.000 dB Q 1.2053
  biquad b0=1.00102590655 b1=-1.99497547068 b2=0.99400045379 a1=-1.99497547068 a2=0.995026360337

  biquad b0=1.00168391922 b1=-1.99161208174 b2=0.990152366988 a1=-1.99161208174 a2=0.991836286209
